assumptions.assumption: Cloud infrastructure is more secure than on-premises data centers
assumptions.challenge: Shared responsibility model means security is still partly customer's job

assumptions.assumption: Migration can be completed within 12 months
Total cost of ownership will decrease by 30%
assumptions.challenge: Data egress costs could offset savings

logic_chain.premise: FinTech companies need high security and compliance
logic_chain.conclusion: Cloud providers with compliance certs are preferred

logic_chain.premise: MAS requires data residency in Singapore
logic_chain.conclusion: Provider must have Singapore region with local support
Selection based on additional criteria (ML, integrations, pricing)

gaps.gap: Zero trust architecture evaluation not performed
Data migration strategy for legacy systems unclear
Cost projection for year 2-3 of migration not modeled

evidence.claim: Cloud providers invest 2x more in security than average enterprise
MAS Technology Risk Management guidelines Section 4.2 mandates data residency
AWS, GCP, Azure all offer Singapore regions with financial services compliance
